title: Information for airline carriers :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Information for airline carriers
Find information about airline carriers' responsibilities, immigration control areas, and New Zealand electronic travel authority (NZeTA) training material for airline staff.
- Working with airline carriers Immigration New Zealand (INZ) works in partnership with trusted airline carriers across the world to protect the security of our borders.

## Working with airline carriers
Immigration New Zealand (INZ) works in partnership with trusted airline carriers across the world to protect the security of our borders.
- Immigration control areas at New Zealand airports There are 7 immigration control areas (ICAs) where we carry out immigration checks on people arriving or leaving New Zealand by air.

## Immigration control areas at New Zealand airports
There are 7 immigration control areas (ICAs) where we carry out immigration checks on people arriving or leaving New Zealand by air.
- New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) training material for airline staff Download training material for airline staff about the NZeTA.

## New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) training material for airline staff
Download training material for airline staff about the NZeTA.
